Popzii Vendor — Dashboard

Overview
--------
React web app for vendors to manage products, orders, and analytics.

Features
--------
- Authentication
- Product management (add/edit/delete)
- Order management
- Sales analytics

Prerequisites
-------------
- Node.js 18+
- Backend running

Running Locally
---------------
1. Install:
   ```
   npm install
   ```
2. Start:
   ```
   npm start
   ```
3. Open http://localhost:3001

Validation
----------
- Login as vendor
- Add products
- View orders
- Check analytics

API
---
- Base URL: http://localhost:4000
- Endpoints: /api/auth, /api/products, /api/orders
